notifications.title: CLEAVE v3.2.4.1 is available
notifications.message: New: sync the same input file across every reconcile unit and Merge sheet (file / header row / sheet, with a Reset). Also includes everything from the 3.2.4.0 release. Update for the latest.

notifications.title: What's new in CLEAVE v3.2.4.1
notifications.message: "Sync same file across units / sheets": a file-section toggle (off by default) that reuses one input file across every reconcile unit or Merge sheet-tab. A settings popover picks what carries over — the file, its header row, and/or its sheet (defaults sync the file + header row; each unit keeps its own sheet). In Reconcile, preload and postload sync independently; in Merge the header-source crown follows the files. Turning it on conforms every unit/tab to the active one.
